88c4d5588aab.6c4cc0b82187: Google Ads often attract people who are just browsing, not ready to buy. Budget gets spent, few prospects come in, and measuring real results is difficult. The main challenge in land marketing is filtering purchase intent from the search stage so every ad rupiah directly impacts sales.
3664ced9e29b.a788623d182e: This campaign focused on lowering cost per prospect, improving lead quality, and stabilizing ad results.
37fbffe9700e.dee2a51e10da:
Purchase Intent Keywords
We selected keywords indicating transaction readiness and blocked general searches that drain budgets.
d5c9666ea089.af9184784555:
Separate Campaign Structure
Ads were separated by purpose, enabling more precise control.
ead0bf650505.1849bd9f7552:
Landing Page Alignment
Landing pages were aligned exactly with ads so visitors aren't confused and focus directly on the desired action.
c6ed70f4ad8b.ce9959ce0ec8: Sales team no longer needs to filter out casual inquiries.
cc507eb8dab1.9f994f6f6a6d: Budget is only spent on people who genuinely need the product.
34f0288b7a41.563ebbe5012b: Time and money focused on potential deals.
d7410f4595ec.9b626e7ce50e: Landing pages could load faster and include shorter forms to reduce abandonment before data submission.
c878ab7daf74.d04466690a1e: Connect ad data directly to a CRM system. Monitor prospect quality weekly, not just click counts. Good ads must be followed by equally well-structured follow-up systems.
